items.title: The Home Depot (HD) Supports Consistent Returns in a Dividend Stock Portfolio
items.description: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is included among the Best Stocks for a Dividend Stock Portfolio. The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is a household name and a dominant force in the home improvement market. With more than 2,000 locations across the US, the retailer has easy access to a vast share of the nation’s consumers. […]
